case_title: CASEY ALLEN VS. AEVUN K NOWELL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER THE JUNE 10,2021 ORDER.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, CASEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-02-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NOWELL, AEVUN K
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-09-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANACES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, CASEY AS TO DEFENDANT NOWELL, AEVUN K
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,875.00 FILED BY ALLEN, CASEY AS TO DEFENDANT NOWELL, AEVUN K ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
